title: Some valid floating-point literals are not recognized.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_floats (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, value FLOAT, description VARCHAR NOT NULL);
INSERT INTO test_floats (value, description) VALUES (1.0, 'Valid float 1.0');
INSERT INTO test_floats (value, description) VALUES (250.0, 'Valid float 2.5e2');
SELECT * FROM test_floats WHERE value = 1.0 OR value = 250.0;
UPDATE test_floats SET value = NULL WHERE id = 1;
key_bug_features: Invalid recognition of valid floating-point literals
